steps.title: Use the contrast marker
steps.content: The underlined sentence begins with "despite his popular reputation," signaling that it corrects a possible assumption about Garcia Marquez. It says he wrote several works of strict realism, even though he is associated with magical realism.

steps.title: Reject unsupported functions
steps.content: Choice A invents a comparison with So Far from God. Choice B invents influence from Mexican American authors. Choice D adds a value judgment about superiority. The sentence instead refutes the idea that Garcia Marquez always wrote magical realism. The answer is C.
